findings.summary: cache defaulted to the brain-dir ROOT, which consumers commit — only vfkb's own .gitignore was patched, so doctor --check-remote would pollute every consumer brain with churn; fixed: default moved to <brainDir>/.signals/ (ignored in every initialized consumer via init's stanza), false code comment rewritten, new unit test pins the default path and forbids the root path

detail strings self-prefixed the check name, rendering 'npm currency — npm currency: …' — prefix dropped, all other words identical, wording-assertion regexes byte-identical in strength (sabotage re-run at the new head: exactly the negative overclaim assertion goes red)
PR body's wording table showed the round-1 self-prefixed strings after the prefix drop — corrected via body amendment
